marketState: neutral-to-bullish - surging cooling demand and an extreme short-money COT setup offset a bearish storage surplus
summary: Front price ($2.954) sits almost exactly at fair value ($2.923, band $2.42-$3.42) across every horizon out to +21D, so there is no mispricing edge to trade right now. The standout signals are on the margins: 8-16 day cooling demand is running +16% above 5-year normal (rangePos 0.75) and rising fast (+14.9 in 24h, +21% vs 5y normal), while managed-money is net short 105.7k contracts at just the 8th percentile of its 5-year range - a historically stretched positioning that has often preceded short-covering rallies. Seasonality is a net positive (69%/63%/44%/69% odds of higher prices in 1/2/3/4 weeks, +3.7% typical 4-week move) but reliability is explicitly flagged LOW (63pp spread), and price is running below its typical seasonal path YTD (-13.3% vs -9.6% median), a bearish undercurrent. Storage is +180 Bcf above the 5-year average with a bearish +22 Bcf build surprise, capping upside. Technicals are split by timeframe: 5m/15m are bullish with a 50>200 EMA cross, but 1d/1w trend is still bearish (RSI 39-43, MACD negative, 50<200 EMA) and 4h is trading above its upper Bollinger band (short-term overbought); futuresCurve data is missing (null) so contango/backwardation cannot be assessed beyond the small front>next spread.

longTerm.sizing: 1R approx 1% account risk; consider entering half now, half on a dip toward $2.80
longTerm.rationale: Extreme managed-money short positioning (8th percentile 5y) plus a strong and rising 8-16D cooling-demand anomaly (+16% vs 5y, rangePos 0.75) argue for mean-reversion/short-covering upside, and seasonality skews higher in 4 weeks (69% odds, +3.7% typical move) even though reliability is low. Fair value itself drifts up from $2.923 now to $3.016 by +21D, giving the trade a rising floor to work with.
longTerm.invalidation: 8-16D demand anomaly fades back toward normal, managed-money shorts stay flat/build further despite the heat, or the storage surplus widens materially beyond +180 Bcf vs 5y with continued bearish build surprises
